channel.title: kernel.org — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by kernel.org (linux).

item.title: CVE-2026-53363 — xfrm: iptfs: preserve shared-frag marker in iptfs_consume_frags()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: xfrm: iptfs: preserve shared-frag marker in iptfs_consume_frags() iptfs_consume_frags() transfers paged fragments from one socket buffer to another but fails to propagate the SKBFL_S…

item.title: CVE-2026-53359 — KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging use-after-free due to unexpected role
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging use-after-free due to unexpected role Commit 0cb2af2ea66ad ("KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging use-after-free due to unexpected GFN") fixed a shadow paging mism…

item.title: CVE-2026-53358 — Bluetooth: L2CAP: use chan timer to close channels in cleanup_listen()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: Bluetooth: L2CAP: use chan timer to close channels in cleanup_listen() l2cap_chan_close() removes the channel from conn->chan_l, which must be done under conn->lock. cleanup_listen()…

item.title: CVE-2026-53357 — Bluetooth: fix UAF in l2cap_sock_cleanup_listen() vs l2cap_conn_del()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: Bluetooth: fix UAF in l2cap_sock_cleanup_listen() vs l2cap_conn_del() bt_accept_dequeue() unlinks a not-yet-accepted child from the parent accept queue and release_sock()s it before…

item.title: CVE-2026-53356 — drm/i915/gem: Fix phys BO pread/pwrite with offset
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/i915/gem: Fix phys BO pread/pwrite with offset sg_page() returns struct page pointer not (void *) so the scaling of pread/pwrite is wrong for phys BO and wrong parts of BO would…

item.title: CVE-2026-53355 — net: rds: clear i_sends on setup unwind
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: rds: clear i_sends on setup unwind The RDS IB connection teardown path is written so it can run during partial startup and on repeated shutdown attempts. It uses NULL pointers t…

item.title: CVE-2026-53354 — arm64: errata: Mitigate TLBI errata on various Arm CPUs
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: arm64: errata: Mitigate TLBI errata on various Arm CPUs A number of CPUs developed by Arm suffer from errata whereby a broadcast TLBI;DSB sequence may complete before the global obse…

item.title: CVE-2026-53353 — hsr: Remove WARN_ONCE() in hsr_addr_is_self().
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: hsr: Remove WARN_ONCE() in hsr_addr_is_self(). syzbot reported the warning [0] in hsr_addr_is_self(), whose assumption is simply wrong. hsr->self_node is cleared in hsr_del_self_node…

item.title: CVE-2026-53352 — signal: clear JOBCTL_PENDING_MASK for caller in zap_other_threads()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: signal: clear JOBCTL_PENDING_MASK for caller in zap_other_threads() When a multi-threaded process receives a stop signal (e.g., SIGSTOP), do_signal_stop() sets JOBCTL_STOP_PENDING an…

item.title: CVE-2026-53351 — riscv/ptrace: Use USER_REGSET_NOTE_TYPE for REGSET_CFI
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: riscv/ptrace: Use USER_REGSET_NOTE_TYPE for REGSET_CFI Fixes a warning while dumping core: [54983.546369][ C7] WARNING: [!note_name] fs/binfmt_elf.c:1771 at elf_core_dump+0x910/0xf68…

item.title: CVE-2026-53350 — ASoC: wm_adsp: Fix NULL dereference when removing firmware controls
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ASoC: wm_adsp: Fix NULL dereference when removing firmware controls In wm_adsp_control_remove() check that the priv pointer is not NULL before attempting to cleanup what it points to…

item.title: CVE-2026-53349 — netfilter: nf_conntrack: destroy stale expectfn expectations on unregister
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: netfilter: nf_conntrack: destroy stale expectfn expectations on unregister NAT helpers such as nf_nat_h323 store a raw pointer to module text in exp->expectfn (e.g. ip_nat_q931_expec…

item.title: CVE-2026-53348 — ASoC: SDCA: fix NULL pointer dereference in sdca_dev_unregister_functions
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ASoC: SDCA: fix NULL pointer dereference in sdca_dev_unregister_functions sdca_dev_unregister_functions() iterates over all SDCA function descriptors and calls sdca_dev_unregister()…

item.title: CVE-2026-53347 — drm/virtio: Fix driver removal with disabled KMS
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/virtio: Fix driver removal with disabled KMS DRM atomic and modesetting aren't initialized if virtio-gpu driver built with disabled KMS, leading to access of uninitialized data o…

item.title: CVE-2026-53346 — rust: arm64: set uwtable llvm module flag for CONFIG_UNWIND_TABLES
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: rust: arm64: set uwtable llvm module flag for CONFIG_UNWIND_TABLES Due to a rustc bug [1] the -Cforce-unwind-tables=y flag only emits the uwtable annotation for functions, but not fo…

item.title: CVE-2026-53345 — KVM: Don't WARN if memory is dirtied without a vCPU when the VM is dying
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KVM: Don't WARN if memory is dirtied without a vCPU when the VM is dying When marking a page dirty, complain about not having a running/loaded vCPU if and only if the VM is still ali…

item.title: CVE-2026-53344 — pinctrl: mcp23s08: Initialize mcp->dev and mcp->addr before regmap init
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: pinctrl: mcp23s08: Initialize mcp->dev and mcp->addr before regmap init Regmap initialization triggers regcache_maple_populate() which attempts SPI read to populate cache. SPI read r…

item.title: CVE-2026-53343 — ARM: 9475/1: entry: use byte load for KASAN VMAP stack shadow
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ARM: 9475/1: entry: use byte load for KASAN VMAP stack shadow Commit 44e9a3bb76e5 ("ARM: 9430/1: entry: Do a dummy read from VMAP shadow") added a dummy read from the KASAN VMAP stac…

item.title: CVE-2026-53342 — arm64: mm: call pagetable dtor when freeing hot-removed page tables
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: arm64: mm: call pagetable dtor when freeing hot-removed page tables Since 5e8eb9aeeda3 ("arm64: mm: always call PTE/PMD ctor in __create_pgd_mapping()") page-table allocation on ARM6…

item.title: CVE-2026-53341 — fhandle: fix UAF due to unlocked ->mnt_ns read in may_decode_fh()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fhandle: fix UAF due to unlocked ->mnt_ns read in may_decode_fh() may_decode_fh() accesses mount::mnt_ns without holding any locks; that means the mount can concurrently be unmounted…

item.title: CVE-2026-53340 — i2c: imx: fix clock and pinctrl state inconsistency in runtime PM
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: i2c: imx: fix clock and pinctrl state inconsistency in runtime PM In i2c_imx_runtime_suspend(), the clock is disabled before switching the pinctrl state to sleep. If pinctrl_pm_selec…

item.title: CVE-2026-53339 — i2c: qcom-cci: Fix NULL pointer dereference in cci_remove()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: i2c: qcom-cci: Fix NULL pointer dereference in cci_remove() On all modern platforms Qualcomm CCI controller provides two I2C masters, and on particular boards only one I2C master may…

item.title: CVE-2026-53338 — net: airoha: Add NULL check for of_reserved_mem_lookup() in airoha_qdma_init_hfwd_queues()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: airoha: Add NULL check for of_reserved_mem_lookup() in airoha_qdma_init_hfwd_queues() of_reserved_mem_lookup() may return NULL if the reserved memory region referenced by the "m…

item.title: CVE-2026-53337 — net: bonding: fix NULL pointer dereference in bond_do_ioctl()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: bonding: fix NULL pointer dereference in bond_do_ioctl() In bond_do_ioctl(), slave_dev is obtained via __dev_get_by_name() which can return NULL if the requested interface name…

item.title: CVE-2026-53336 — nvmem: layouts: onie-tlv: fix hang on unknown types
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: nvmem: layouts: onie-tlv: fix hang on unknown types The EEPROM on my board has a vendor specific entry of type 0x41. When stumbling upon that, this driver hangs in an endless loop. F…

item.title: CVE-2026-53335 — mm/damon/lru_sort: handle ctx allocation failure
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: mm/damon/lru_sort: handle ctx allocation failure DAMON_LRU_SORT allocates the damon_ctx object for its kdamond in its init function. damon_lru_sort_enabled_store() wrongly assumes th…

item.title: CVE-2026-53334 — mm/damon/reclaim: handle ctx allocation failure
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: mm/damon/reclaim: handle ctx allocation failure Patch series "mm/damon/{reclaim,lru_sort}: handle ctx allocation failures". DAMON_RECLAIM and DAMON_LRU_SORT could dereference NULL po…

item.title: CVE-2026-53333 — mm/mincore: handle non-swap entries before !CONFIG_SWAP guard
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: mm/mincore: handle non-swap entries before !CONFIG_SWAP guard mincore_swap() also fields migration/hwpoison entries (and shmem swapin-error entries), which can exist on !CONFIG_SWAP…

item.title: CVE-2026-53332 — slimbus: qcom-ngd-ctrl: Register callbacks after creating the ngd
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: slimbus: qcom-ngd-ctrl: Register callbacks after creating the ngd When the remoteproc starts in parallel with the NGD driver being probed, or the remoteproc is already up when the PD…

item.title: CVE-2026-53331 — slimbus: qcom-ngd-ctrl: Avoid ABBA on tx_lock/ctrl->lock
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: slimbus: qcom-ngd-ctrl: Avoid ABBA on tx_lock/ctrl->lock During the SSR/PDR down notification the tx_lock is taken with the intent to provide synchronization with active DMA transfer…

item.title: CVE-2026-53330 — drm/amd/display: Fix out-of-bounds read in dp_get_eq_aux_rd_interval()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/amd/display: Fix out-of-bounds read in dp_get_eq_aux_rd_interval() [Why & How] The aux_rd_interval array in struct dc_lttpr_caps is declared with MAX_REPEATER_CNT - 1 (7) element…

item.title: CVE-2026-53329 — drm/amd/display: Use krealloc_array() in dal_vector_reserve()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/amd/display: Use krealloc_array() in dal_vector_reserve() [Why & How] dal_vector_reserve() computes the allocation size as "capacity * vector->struct_size" using uint32_t arithme…

item.title: CVE-2026-53328 — sched_ext: Don't warn on NULL cgrp_moving_from in scx_cgroup_move_task()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: sched_ext: Don't warn on NULL cgrp_moving_from in scx_cgroup_move_task() A WARN fires when systemd's user manager writes "+cpu +memory +pids" to its own subtree_control while a sched…

item.title: CVE-2026-53327 — debugobjects: Do not fill_pool() if pi_blocked_on
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: debugobjects: Do not fill_pool() if pi_blocked_on On RT enabled kernels, fill_pool() ends up calling rtlock_lock(), which asserts if current::pi_blocked_on is set, because a task can…

item.title: CVE-2026-53326 — debugobjects: Don't call fill_pool() in early boot hardirq context
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: debugobjects: Don't call fill_pool() in early boot hardirq context When booting a debug PREEMPT_RT kernel on an ARM64 system, a "inconsistent {HARDIRQ-ON-W} -> {IN-HARDIRQ-W} usage"…

item.title: CVE-2026-53324 — net: mana: Use pci_name() for debugfs directory naming
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: mana: Use pci_name() for debugfs directory naming Use pci_name(pdev) for the per-device debugfs directory instead of hardcoded "0" for PFs and pci_slot_name(pdev->slot) for VFs.…

item.title: CVE-2026-53323 — net: dsa: remove redundant netdev_lock_ops() from conduit ethtool ops
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: dsa: remove redundant netdev_lock_ops() from conduit ethtool ops DSA replaces the conduit (master) device's ethtool_ops with its own wrappers that aggregate stats from both the…

item.title: CVE-2026-53322 · 8.8 HIGH — vfio/pci: Clean up DMABUFs before disabling function
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: vfio/pci: Clean up DMABUFs before disabling function On device shutdown, make vfio_pci_core_close_device() call vfio_pci_dma_buf_cleanup() before the function is disabled via vfio_pc…

item.title: CVE-2026-53321 — io_uring/napi: cap busy_poll_to 10 msec
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: io_uring/napi: cap busy_poll_to 10 msec Currently there's no cap on the maximum amount of time that napi is allowed to poll if no events are found, which can lead to kernel complaint…

item.title: CVE-2026-53320 — nilfs2: reject zero bd_oblocknr in nilfs_ioctl_mark_blocks_dirty()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: nilfs2: reject zero bd_oblocknr in nilfs_ioctl_mark_blocks_dirty() nilfs_ioctl_mark_blocks_dirty() uses bd_oblocknr to detect dead blocks by comparing it with the current block numbe…

item.title: CVE-2026-53319 — blk-wbt: remove WARN_ON_ONCE from wbt_init_enable_default()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: blk-wbt: remove WARN_ON_ONCE from wbt_init_enable_default() wbt_init_enable_default() uses WARN_ON_ONCE to check for failures from wbt_alloc() and wbt_init(). However, both are expec…

item.title: CVE-2026-53318 — wifi: mt76: mt7925: prevent NULL pointer dereference in mt7925_tx_check_aggr()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: mt76: mt7925: prevent NULL pointer dereference in mt7925_tx_check_aggr() Move the NULL check for 'sta' before dereferencing it to prevent a possible crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-53317 — wifi: mt76: mt7921: Place upper limit on station AID
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: mt76: mt7921: Place upper limit on station AID Any station configured with an AID over 20 causes a firmware crash. This situation occurred in our testing using an AP interface…

item.title: CVE-2026-53316 — drm/amd/ras: Fix NULL deref in ras_core_ras_interrupt_detected()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/amd/ras: Fix NULL deref in ras_core_ras_interrupt_detected() Fixes a NULL pointer dereference when ras_core is NULL and ras_core->dev is accessed in the error path. Reported by:…

item.title: CVE-2026-53315 — drm/amd/ras: Fix NULL deref in ras_core_get_utc_second_timestamp()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/amd/ras: Fix NULL deref in ras_core_get_utc_second_timestamp() ras_core_get_utc_second_timestamp() retrieves the current UTC timestamp (in seconds since the Unix epoch) through a…

item.title: CVE-2026-53314 — padata: Put CPU offline callback in ONLINE section to allow failure
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: padata: Put CPU offline callback in ONLINE section to allow failure syzbot reported the following warning: DEAD callback error for CPU1 WARNING: kernel/cpu.c:1463 at _cpu_down+0x759/…

item.title: CVE-2026-53313 — drm/amd/display: Avoid NULL dereference in dc_dmub_srv error paths
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: drm/amd/display: Avoid NULL dereference in dc_dmub_srv error paths In dc_dmub_srv_log_diagnostic_data() and dc_dmub_srv_enable_dpia_trace(). Both functions check: if (!dc_dmub_srv ||…

item.title: CVE-2026-53312 — iommu/riscv: Remove overflows on the invalidation path
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: iommu/riscv: Remove overflows on the invalidation path Since RISC-V supports a sign extended page table it should support a gather->end of ULONG_MAX, but if this happens it will infi…

item.title: CVE-2026-53311 — fuse: fix uninit-value in fuse_dentry_revalidate()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fuse: fix uninit-value in fuse_dentry_revalidate() fuse_dentry_revalidate() may be called with a dentry that didn't had ->d_time initialised. The issue was found with KMSAN, where lo…

item.title: CVE-2026-53310 — soc/tegra: cbb: Fix cross-fabric target timeout lookup
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: soc/tegra: cbb: Fix cross-fabric target timeout lookup When a fabric receives an error interrupt, the error may have occurred on a different fabric. The target timeout lookup was usi…
